title: FEES (PENGKALAN KUBOR FERRY) (VALIDATION) ACT 2025

Fees (Pengkalan Kubor Ferry) (Validation) 3
An Act to validate the collection of fees in respect of ferry services 
between Pengkalan Kubor, Malaysia and Takbai, Thailand which 
was administrated and regulated by the Public Works Department of  
Malaysia during the period of 1 January 1999 to 31 December 2024.  
 [ ]
ENACTED  by the Parliament of Malaysia as follows:
Short title
1. This Act may be cited as the Fees (Pengkalan Kubor Ferry) 
(Validation) Act 2025.
Validation and indemnity
2. (1) Notwithstanding the provisions of the Fees Act 1951 [ Act 209 ],  
the fees which were charged and collected by the Public Works 
Department of Malaysia in respect of ferry services between  
Pengkalan Kubor, Malaysia and Takbai, Thailand during the 
period of 1 January 1999 to 31 December 2024 shall be deemed 
to have been validly charged and collected.LAWS OF MALAYSIA
Act 871
FEES (PENGKALAN KUBOR FERRY) 
(V ALIDATION) ACT 2025

Laws of Malaysia 4
Act 871
 (2) No action or legal proceedings shall be brought or instituted 
against the Government of Malaysia, any officer of the Government 
of Malaysia or any person acting under the directions of any 
officer of the Government of Malaysia in respect of any fees 
which were charged and collected during the period referred to 
in subsection (1), and if any such action or legal proceedings 
has been brought or instituted, it shall be discharged and made 
void, and no refund in respect of the fees charged and collected 
as specified in this Act shall be made.
